title: How to use API to fill in Location column?
excerpt:
Hello, 
How can I use API to fill in the location column? How can I use API at all? Not familier with it…

posts.author: Jappa (Jasper Schulten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

How can I use API to fill in the location column? How can I use API at all? Not familier with it…

posts.author: danperks (Dan perks)
posts.cookedHtml:
The API is a GraphQL API, which if you’ve never used it before (like I hadn’t) is slightly different from traditional REST APIs. There’s some good parts of the documentation to help you get started here:
https://api.developer.monday.com/docs/basics

To specifically interact with a location column, the documentation for that is here:
https://api.developer.monday.com/docs/location

posts.author: Jappa (Jasper Schulten)
posts.cookedHtml: Links don’t work anymore, and I couldn’t solve th the issue with the Location column

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
monday API docs

monday.com GraphQL API

The monday GraphQL API allows developers to programmatically access and update data inside a monday.com account. It is part of the monday apps framework.
